seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Mariana Du Preez - Marinda Kook

html:
If someone calls me Lollie, you should know it's someone from my distant past. That's my growing-up name.

Mariana du Preez calls me that. She comes from my distant past. We studied together 42 years ago and never lost touch. She's an artist, and she and I attach different values to the word palette. She uses it to paint with, and I try to stir it up with food.

She doesn't like cooking. She detests cooking. She doesn't wear an apron to cook, only to paint. After a few glasses of wine and a lot of persuading, she promised she'd try again.

Tune in Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147 for this special episode.
